core_mechanism: resonant coupling of a discrete two-level subsystem to a single quantized harmonic-oscillator mode with quantized energy exchange (a Jaynes-Cummings / quantum-Rabi coupled two-level-oscillator system), producing entangled eigenstates and avoided crossings at single- and multi-quantum resonances, plus collapse-and-revival dynamics of the excitation
brief_reason: The abstract reduces the junction-cavity system near resonance to its lowest two levels coupled to a single-mode oscillator, with single- and two-photon resonant absorption tuned by a control parameter and 'collapse and revival' dynamics, which is exactly a two-level-system-plus-quantized-oscillator resonant-exchange model.
